text: The mural dominates the far wall of the platform — paint cracked but colours still vivid after all these years.
Most who find this place turn back at the gates. The ones who don't... they're usually looking for something.
The figure in the mural seems to shift — or perhaps it is just the light.
Somewhere in the depths of this station, something is waiting. The security checkpoint to the north holds answers — if you can get past it.
